reviews.review_description: Good use of vr and good music!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the review and playing!

reviews.review_description: Just got my gear vr yesterday and seen this app. Had no issues downloading or running it. Beautiful music and outstanding textures. You can tell the creators put a lot of effort into this app. Thumps up devs!

developer_response.body: Thank you! This app was a humble effort. I appreciate you spending time listening and watching!

reviews.review_description: Very creative can't wait to see what you pull with a budget

developer_response.body: Thanks my friend! Working on live streaming concerts...

reviews.review_title: A must see app! Absolutely amazing []-)
reviews.review_description: This is am amazingly well done fusion of great music and Virtual Reality! I want to thank Shaun, the developer of this experience for giving such a great gift to the VR community. The music is great and the app is so cool. I highly recommend checking this one out and if you like it head over to the developers website and grab a copy of his CD to show some love. I can't wait to see what comes next for Infinity Equals One and for Doublehead []-)

reviews.review_title: i love people because Jesus loves me

reviews.review_description: The more you think about how cool an idea is, to walk through a trippy dreamscape. Listening to a music album. Experiencing different levels to the music... it's ingenious.. imagine a beetles album.. imagine a Metallica album! Imagine a doublehead album.. Oh wait you don't have to. It's right here! Bravo!

His music really makes the experience, all the more enjoyable. As a fan of the psychedelic arts, it had me searching every nook and cranny to see where it would take me. Thought I had everything covered, until I spoke with Shaun (aka Doublehead) and realized there were some stuff I missed. Looks like it's time to jump back on, and explore some more. Great job Shaun. Looking forward to chatting with you more on vTime, my friend.
